mapper.select: SELECT id, doctor_name, department_name, DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS work_date, time_slot, room, status FROM doctor_schedules ORDER BY work_date DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, doctor_name, department_name, DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS work_date, time_slot, room, status FROM doctor_schedules WHERE doctor_name = #{doctorName} ORDER BY work_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, doctor_name, department_name, DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS work_date, time_slot, room, status FROM doctor_schedules WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor_schedules (doctor_name, department_name, work_date, time_slot, room, status) VALUES (#{doctorName}, #{departmentName}, #{workDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{room}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor_schedules SET doctor_name = #{doctorName}, department_name = #{departmentName}, work_date = #{workDate}, time_slot = #{timeSlot}, room = #{room}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
